title: The law graduates who cleared UPSC 2025 exam
description: At least 20 law graduates have cracked the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Civil Service Examinations, 2025.Ishan Bhatnagar, a 2023 graduate of National Law University Delhi (NLU Delhi), has secured All India Rank 5.Rupal Jaiswal, a 2020 graduate of Symbiosis Law School Pune (SLSP), has secured All India Rank 43. Prateek Mudgal, a graduate of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU), has secured All India Rank 54. Devansh Gupta, a 2021 graduate of SLSP, has secured All India Rank 77.Mansi Gupta, a
